headline: Labcorp (LH) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: With me today are Adam Schechter, our Chairman and Chief Executive Officer; and Julia Wang, our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.  This morning, in the Events section of the Labcorp Investor Relations website at ir.labcorp.com, we posted both our press release and a supplemental financial presentation with additional information on our business and operations.  Please see the Use of Adjusted Measures section in the supplemental presentation for more information regarding our use of non-GAAP financial measures.
